acceptance.rule: naive ≈ cmplog at MAGIC_BYTES=1; naive << cmplog at MAGIC_BYTES=4; naive=0, cmplog>0 at MAGIC_BYTES=8

design_basis: I2S advantage scales with constant width: 1/256^N collapse for naive vs ~constant for cmp. Single integer comparison, no partial-match edges, mechanism isolated.
notes: MAGIC_BYTES=1: naive expected ~600k/256 ≈ 2300 crashes per trial; cmp similar or faster
MAGIC_BYTES=2: naive expected ~600k×600/65536 ≈ 5500 crashes per trial; cmp instant
MAGIC_BYTES=4: naive expected ~0-1 crash per 600s (1/4G probability per exec); cmp instant
MAGIC_BYTES=8: naive expected 0 crashes; cmp instant
